short_advice: Enjoy the outdoors! Minimal sun protection needed.
detailed_actions: Wear sunglasses on bright days
Use SPF 15 sunscreen if you burn easily
Great time for outdoor exercise

short_advice: Take some precautions. Seek shade during midday.
detailed_actions: Stay in shade near midday
Wear a hat and sunglasses
Apply SPF 15-30 sunscreen on exposed skin
Watch out if near water or sand (reflection increases UV)

short_advice: Protection essential. Reduce time in the sun 10am-4pm.
detailed_actions: Reduce sun exposure between 10am and 4pm
Seek shade whenever possible
Wear protective clothing, wide-brim hat, sunglasses
Apply SPF 30+ sunscreen, reapply every 2 hours

short_advice: Extra protection needed. Avoid midday sun.
detailed_actions: Avoid sun exposure between 10am and 4pm
Must seek shade during peak hours
Wear SPF 50+ and reapply every 90 minutes
Protective clothing, hat, and UV-blocking sunglasses essential
Check on children and elderly regularly

short_advice: Maximum protection required. Avoid ALL sun if possible.
detailed_actions: Avoid outdoor sun exposure entirely if possible
If outdoors: full protective clothing, SPF 50+, wide-brim hat
Reapply sunscreen every 60-90 minutes
Stay indoors or in deep shade during 9am-5pm
Unprotected skin can burn in under 10 minutes
